findings.summary: 3 focus stop(s) have a visible indicator that does not meet the AAA Focus Appearance bar (>= 2px-perimeter area and >= 3:1 contrast). Informative only. e.g. #tab-1 (contrast 1.8), #panel-1 (contrast 2.95), #tab-1 (contrast 2.43)
findings.persona_impact: The focus indicator is present but may be hard to perceive for low-vision users.

findings.summary: 1 focusable control(s) have no accessible name: tabpanel at #panel-1
findings.persona_impact: A keyboard user who relies on speech recognition cannot target these controls by voice, and their purpose is not conveyed programmatically.
